personal.name: Fredrik Andersson
personal.title: Fullstack Developer
personal.tagline: Fullstack developer building fast, scalable systems with clean code, solid performance, and practical solutions people actually use.
personal.bio: Hi! I'm Fredrik, a fullstack developer from Stockholm. I build web applications from frontend to backend with a focus on performance, scalability, and a good user experience. I have experience working with real-time data and modern technologies like React, TypeScript, and Rust. I enjoy solving problems, building stable systems, and writing code that is easy to understand and continue developing.

experience.title: Intern at Coneqt
experience.description: Intern at Coneqt, a logistics and transportation marketplace. Working on a system that helps companies find the right carriers, optimize deliveries, and streamline the entire chain with AI and modern technology.
responsibilities: Developing parts of the frontend in React and TypeScript
Contributing to the logistics marketplace platform
Making sure the platform stays scalable and responsive

experience.title: Fullstack Developer
experience.description: Helped build Aveno, a CRM and project management platform from the ground up. Responsible for part of the frontend development and involved in the backend architecture.
responsibilities: Frontend development with React and TypeScript
Working closely with a strong team
Making sure the app is fast and can grow with customers

education.degree: Vocational Degree in Fullstack Development C# .NET
education.description: Vocational training in fullstack development with C# and .NET. I learned the full stack from frontend and backend to databases and real project work. The program gave me a solid foundation in web development and practical experience through projects that solve real problems, including my internships at Coneqt and Aveno.

education.degree: Technical Preparatory Year in Information & Media Technology
education.description: Preparatory year in IT and media. It included more advanced programming, web development, and IT fundamentals. It gave me a solid foundation in programming and IT that I built on in my vocational training.

education.degree: High School Diploma in Information Technology
education.description: High school education in IT and media. Programming, networking, web development, and a broad mix of technical subjects. This is where I got my first real experience with programming and decided to pursue it further.

values.title: Clean Code
values.description: Code that is easy to read and maintain. Not just for me, but for the next person who has to work with it.

values.title: Curious
values.description: Always interested in new tools and techniques, not because they are new, but because they can solve problems better.

values.title: Users First
values.description: An app can have great code, but if it is painful to use, it does not matter.

values.title: Good Teamwork
values.description: I enjoy working with others, sharing knowledge, and building something together that is bigger than the sum of its parts.

projects.title: 'Coneqt' a logistics and transportation marketplace
projects.shortDescription: A logistics and transportation marketplace that connects shippers with carriers, optimizing deliveries and streamlining operations.
projects.description: Coneqt is a logistics and transportation marketplace that connects shippers with carriers. The platform optimizes deliveries, streamlines operations, and provides real-time tracking and analytics. Built with React, Rust, PostgreSQL, Tailwind CSS, and Docker.
projects.longDescription:
Coneqt is a logistics and transportation marketplace that connects shippers with carriers. The platform optimizes deliveries, streamlines operations, and provides real-time tracking and analytics. Built with React, Rust, PostgreSQL, Tailwind CSS, and Docker.

My role: I worked on the frontend in React and TypeScript and contributed to backend development in Rust. The focus was on real-time data, performance, and building stable features in a production system.

projects.title: 'Aveno' a CRM and project management platform
projects.shortDescription: A CRM and project management platform that helps companies keep track of customer relationships, projects, and team collaboration.
projects.description: Aveno is a complete CRM solution for managing customer relationships, tracking projects, and keeping tabs on team collaboration. Project tracking, customer management, and analytics all in one place.
projects.longDescription:
Aveno is a CRM platform for small and large companies. Here you can manage customer relationships, track projects, collaborate with your team, and get an overview of business metrics. Fast interface, real-time updates, and integrations with tools you already use.

My role: I worked on both frontend and backend, developing features in React and TypeScript while contributing to the backend architecture in Rust, with a focus on real-time data and system scalability.

projects.title: 'BAMF' an e-commerce platform
projects.shortDescription: An e-commerce platform for selling online. Easy to manage inventory, handle orders, and get paid.
projects.description: BAMF is an e-commerce platform that makes it easy to start and run an online store. Inventory management, order handling, and payment system all in one place.
projects.longDescription:
BAMF is an e-commerce solution that is polished and functional. Manage products, take orders, process payments, and keep track of performance. Built to be fast and straightforward to work with.

My role: I worked on both frontend and backend with a focus on usability, structure, and building a stable platform that is easy to use.

certifications.name: Information Technology Specialist in HTML and CSS
Information Technology Specialist in JavaScript
